#  Search for and Filter Drawings (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' or higher permissions on the Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * If your project uses drawing areas to organize drawings, you can only search drawings in one area at a time. See [What are Drawing Areas?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-drawing-areas)
    * You can search for text that appears on drawings. When searching for text within drawings:
      * Procore highlights the search term on the drawings it appears on.
      * Only results for vector text can be found. See [What is the difference between raster and vector content in PDFs?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-raster-and-vector-content-in-pdfs)
      * Text within drawing markups (e.g. text box markups, linked items) is not included in the search.


##  Steps 
  * Search for Drawings
  * Filter Drawings


#### Search for Drawings
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool on your Android device.
  2. Enter a word or phrase in the Search bar.  
![Drawings Android Search Drawings](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/aaaf90dde1aad2af7227d6ac40c21ca3/82de7d30baa324cfd831a5f6e34f4cc9/drawings-android-search-drawings.png?fm=webp)  
The following data can be searched:
     * Number
     * Title
     * Set Name
     * Discipline
     * Vector text on drawings
  3. As you type, Procore will update with the search results.
  4. Tap to select the drawing you want to view.  
_Note:_ If you are searching for text that appears on drawings, Procore highlights the search term on the drawings it appears on.


#### Filter Drawings
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool on your Android device.
  2. Tap the **Filter**   
![Drawings Android Filter Drawings](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7766ca892b56e39849485f07c3700fa9/180117e8368ac9c4db43f8f54d63edbc/drawings-android-filter-drawings.png?fm=webp)
  3. Mark the checkboxes next to the disciplines you want to filter by.
  4. Tap **Apply**.


## See Also
  * [Link Items to a Drawing (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/link-items-to-a-drawing-android)
  * [Delete Drawing Markups (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/delete-drawing-markups-android)
  * [Create RFIs on a Drawing (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/create-rfis-on-a-drawing-android)
title: Search for and Filter Drawings (Android)
description: How to use the search and filter options to find a specific drawings in the project's Drawings tool with Android mobile device.
